---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible bug with impact and evidence
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary
Describe the bug clearly and briefly.

## Impact
- Affected user role:
- Affected flow:
- Severity: low | medium | high | critical

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to ...
2. Click ...
3. Submit ...
4. Observe ...

## Expected Behavior
Describe what should happen.

## Actual Behavior
Describe what happened instead.

## Evidence
- Screenshots or recordings:
- Logs or error messages:
- API endpoint (if relevant):

## Environment
- App version:
- Browser:
- OS:
- Backend environment: local | staging | production

## Regression Check
- [ ] This worked in a previous version
- [ ] I can reproduce consistently

## Suggested Fix (Optional)
Describe a potential fix if known.
